title: gymnotrix flaccida
side_effects: Gymnotrix flaccida can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to cardiovascular problems, such as palpitations, high blood pressure, and even heart arrhythmia. Additionally, improper use of the plant may cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues. In severe cases, it may also induce seizures, coma, or even death in rare instances.
